matches.x: Every way of a man is right in his own eyes: but the Lord pondereth the hearts.
My heart panteth, my strength faileth me: as for the light of mine eyes, it also is gone from me.

Behold, the Lord, the Lord of Hosts shall lop the bough with terror; and the high ones of stature shall be hewn down; and the haughty shall be humbled.

And the mean man shall be brought down, and the mighty man shall be humbled, and the eyes of the lofty shall be humbled.

I had never neglected this important duty, yet, seeing such confidence

was the first time a suit had ever been preferred before a court

And he shall redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
Let Israel hope in the Lord: for with the Lord there is mercy, and with him is plenteous redemption.

Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope by the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,
But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts: and be ready always to give an answer to every man that asketh you a reason of the hope that is in you with meekness and fear:

And your whole labor shall be in Zion, with all your soul, from henceforth; yea, you shall ever open your mouth in my cause, not fearing what man can do, for I am with you. Amen.
Then I will establish the throne of thy kingdom upon Israel for ever, as I promised to David thy father, saying, There shall not fail thee a man upon the throne of Israel.

For thy people Israel didst thou make thine own people for ever; and thou, Lord, becamest their God.
